project.project_name: Seahorse Offshore Wind Farm GP Survey

comments.comment_text: The document provided seems very general in line with ISO 9001 standard but does not clearly explain how the requirements of ISO 9001 are applied by Geoview (no reference to internal procedures, specifications, no frequency of audit, no frequency for the Mangement review, ...).
comments.summary_ko: The document provided seems very general in line with ISO 9001 standard but does... 검토 및 수정 필요.
